description.zh: OpenAI codex (@openai/codex) CLI 适配 · spawn `codex exec --json` 子进程,ChatEvent 流桥接到 Bus。实际 runner 在 server/src/cli-providers/codex/,本 plugin 声明 metadata + Bus 入口。
description.en: OpenAI codex (@openai/codex) CLI adapter. Spawns `codex exec --json` and bridges ChatEvent streams onto the Bus. Real runner lives in server/src/cli-providers/codex/; this plugin declares metadata + Bus entry.
